description: Style Note Lend a new season twist to your wardrobe with this pair of red chief shoes. Crafted from the highest quality leather (that's also recyclable!) which won't burn a hole in your pocket - this is your go-to option for comfy leather footwear. Product Details Caramel brown shoe with central lace- ups, overlays and reinforced overlay at the heel collar Padded tongue and inner Foamy rubber midsole Rubber outsole with circular grooves and branding on the midfoot Material and Care Leather Wipe with clean dry cloth to remove dust Do not store under direct sunlight
